title: AI Model Comparison Playground

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: AI Model Comparison Playground

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>\n<rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' fill='#090a0f'/>
<text x='20' y='20' fill='#ffffff' font-size='24'>AI Model Comparison</text>
<rect x='20' y='60' width='360' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
<text x='40' y='70' fill='#411C56' font-size='18'>Search Models</text>
<rect x='20' y='120' width='360' height='20' fill='#C06C88'/>
<text x='40' y='130' fill='#411C56' font-size='18'>Filter by Type</text>
<g transform='translate(20,150)'>
<rect x='0' y='0' width='100' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
<text x='10' y='10' fill='#411C56' font-size='18'>Performance</text>
</g>
<g transform='translate(150,150)'>
<rect x='0' y='0' width='100' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
<text x='10' y='10' fill='#411C56' font-size='18'>Model Type</text>
</g>
<rect x='20' y='220' width='380' height='20' fill='#090a0f'/>
<text x='40' y='230' fill='#ffffff' font-size='18'>Models Grid</text>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use the specified colors for each model type
Must implement a search bar for filtering models
Must have a grid selection feature with interactive sorting and filtering

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: AI Model Comparison Playground

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive search functionality, filter by type and performance, and grid selection with sorting and filtering.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
